query:
-- Corrigir processos com status Finalizado + phase Arquivado que estão errados
UPDATE processos
SET 
  status_resumido = 'arquivado_encerrado',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE 
  raw_payload IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.status')) = 'Finalizado'
    OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) LIKE '%rquivado%'
    OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) LIKE '%xtinto%'
    OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) LIKE '%ncerrado%'
  )
  AND status_resumido IN ('em_analise_inicial', 'protocolado');

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT status_resumido, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM processos GROUP BY status_resumido ORDER BY qtd DESC;

    OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.phase')) LIKE '%ncerrado%'
